item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggers a brake on the repeated pattern of patching each failure with another information overlay, explicitly warning against making “发现一个漏点就再塞一句” the operating model. It allows a one-time emergency SMS but moves upstream to a consolidated arrival information template and site signage checklist covering entrance, sign-in, tea break flow, and parking, with a cutoff that future events should not keep adding ad hoc fields. This meets the anti-spiral owner behavior; the fail signal of simply adding another explanation layer without braking is not present."}
